name: Aclarion, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Aclarion is a healthcare technology company that leverages Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopy (MRS), and proprietary biomarkers to optimize clinical treatments. Aclarions technology addresses the $134.5B U.S. low back and neck pain market, which according to a 2020 JAMA (Journal of the American Medical Association) article is now the most costly healthcare condition in the United States.
